name: The Voice
overview: "Y Llais" is the Welsh-language adaptation of the globally popular singing competition, The Voice. Airing on S4C, the show features four renowned coaches searching for the best Welsh-speaking vocal talent. Contestants compete through blind auditions, battles, and live performances, aiming to win the title of Y Llais champion. With a focus on vocal ability and mentorship, the series celebrates the rich musical heritage of Wales.

trailers.title: Cymru, dy dro di. 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁷󠁬󠁳󠁿 | Get ready, Cymru. Y Llais is here!
